# Read input
A = list(map(int, input().split()))
B = list(map(int, input().split()))

# Calculate total scores
score_takahashi = sum(A)
score_aoki = sum(B)

# Calculate the minimum runs needed for Aoki to win
required_runs = score_takahashi - score_aoki + 1

# Output the result
print(required_runs)
